why_it_blocks_retest: Retest cannot be considered while the active source-of-truth readiness gate still declares final_decision = belum_boleh_retest.
required_evidence: A refreshed phase_b_retest_readiness_gate artifact on the updated provisional core stack where final_decision is no longer belum_boleh_retest
Explicit evidence that the refreshed gate no longer reports a minimum-retest-path blocking gate as highest_blocking_gate
Explicit evidence that framework_governance_gate is cleared on the minimum retest path
Explicit evidence that retest_governance_artifacts_synced = true across active artifacts
A formal statement that the refreshed gate supersedes the prior blocked gate as active source of truth
sequencing_rules: Do not open retest during this setup phase.
Do not open paper trading during this setup phase.
Do not open new strategy experiments.
Resolve readiness-gate status first before opening work on the next blocker family.
Treat only the official minimum retest blockers as gate-clearance dependencies unless a newer formal policy changes them.
exit_criteria: The meaning of phase_b_retest_readiness_gate_cleared is frozen explicitly.
The minimum evidence required to change the gate from fail/blocked to cleared is frozen explicitly.
Dependency states for the minimum retest path are listed without ambiguity.
Roadmap points directly to phase_b_retest_readiness_gate resolution execution on the updated provisional core stack.
